tweets.content:
Thread: The $2,500 lie that every contractor believes.

You're told leads cost $25-75 each.

What no one tells you:
- That lead was sold to 4 other contractors
- 3 of them already called
- The customer booked before you even saw the email

So your "$25 lead" actually cost you $2,500...

Because you paid for 100 leads and closed 1.

There's a better way. 🧵👇

The FTC just fined a lead gen company $5.3M for selling exclusive leads to 6 contractors at once.

"Exclusive" meant nothing.

The entire industry runs on this lie.

JobSure's model: one contractor per trade per metro. If the lead is yours, it's yours.

No fine print. No split. No race. https://jobservic.es

We ran the numbers on 14,000 service calls across 3 pilot markets.

Shared lead networks: 11% close rate.
JobSure exclusive territories: 34% close rate.

That's not a small improvement. That's 3x.

When a homeowner only calls one plumber, that plumber gets the job.

Simple math, broken industry.

Your current lead gen setup:
- $800-2,000/mo subscription
- Leads arrive 8-45 min late
- Customer already called 2 other shops
- You pay whether they book or not

JobSure:
- $0/mo
- Leads arrive in under 2 min
- You're the only contractor who gets them
- You pay 5% only when the job books

This isn't a better lead plan. It's a different category.

The JobSure agent runs 24/7.

It answers calls at 2 AM. Qualifies the lead. Matches the job to the right contractor in under 90 seconds. Books the appointment.

No call center markup. No middleman. No missed emergency calls.

Just an autonomous AI agent and an exclusive territory.

That's it. That's the whole product.

We launch next week. 12 metros. One plumber each.

First come, first served. https://jobservic.es
